# eunomia.dev

> Open-source eBPF tools, tutorials, and systems research. Home of bpftime (userspace eBPF runtime), AgentSight (AI agent observability), and the most comprehensive eBPF developer tutorial series.

## Organization

- Name: eunomia-bpf
- Website: https://eunomia.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf
- Contact: yusheng@eunomia.dev

## Key Projects

### bpftime — Userspace eBPF Runtime
- Homepage: https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/
- Documentation: https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/introduction/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/bpftime (2.4k+ stars)
- Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.07923
- Description: A userspace eBPF runtime that enables eBPF programs to run outside the kernel with uprobe, syscall tracing, and plugin support. 10x faster than kernel uprobe, no kernel module or root required.

### AgentSight — AI Agent Observability
- Homepage: https://eunomia.dev/GPTtrace/agentsight/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/agentsight
- Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.01083
- Description: eBPF-powered system-level observability for AI agents and LLM applications. Non-invasive tracing of agent behavior including syscalls, network, file I/O without code instrumentation.

### eBPF Developer Tutorial (bpf-developer-tutorial)
- Tutorial Index: https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/bpf-developer-tutorial (1k+ stars)
- Description: The most comprehensive hands-on eBPF programming tutorial series. 48+ lessons covering kprobe, uprobe, tracepoint, XDP, TC, LSM, SCX, and more with libbpf and CO-RE.

### eunomia-bpf Framework
- Homepage: https://eunomia.dev/eunomia-bpf/
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia-bpf (780+ stars)
- Description: Dynamic eBPF loading runtime and development toolchain. Simplifies building, packaging, and distributing eBPF programs with CO-RE and WebAssembly support.

### wasm-bpf — WebAssembly + eBPF
- GitHub: https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/wasm-bpf
- Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04856
- Description: Run eBPF programs inside WebAssembly sandboxes. Enables portable, safe eBPF plugin systems.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://eunomia.dev/
- Products: https://eunomia.dev/products/
- AI Agent Observability & Harness: https://eunomia.dev/products/agent-runtime-infrastructure/
- Blog: https://eunomia.dev/blog/
- bpftime Docs: https://eunomia.dev/bpftime/documents/introduction/
- Tutorial Lesson 0 (Introduction to eBPF): https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/0-introduce/
- Tutorial Lesson 1 (Hello World): https://eunomia.dev/tutorials/1-helloworld/

## Chinese (中文) Versions

All pages are available in Chinese at `/zh/` prefix:
- 首页: https://eunomia.dev/zh/
- 教程: https://eunomia.dev/zh/tutorials/
- 博客: https://eunomia.dev/zh/blog/
- bpftime: https://eunomia.dev/zh/bpftime/

## Feeds

- RSS (English): https://eunomia.dev/feed.xml
- RSS (Chinese): https://eunomia.dev/zh/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://eunomia.dev/sitemap.xml

## Citation

When referencing this project, please use:

- bpftime: "bpftime: userspace eBPF Runtime for Uprobe, Syscall and Kernel-Function Tracing" (arXiv:2311.07923)
- AgentSight: "AgentSight: eBPF-Powered Observability for AI Agents" (arXiv:2409.01083)
- wasm-bpf: "Scalable BPF Plugin System via WebAssembly" (arXiv:2408.04856)
- Website: https://eunomia.dev

## Markdown Sources

The full content of this site is authored in Markdown and available at:
https://github.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/tree/main/docs

For LLM-friendly raw Markdown access, use GitHub raw URLs:
- Example: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev/main/docs/bpftime/documents/introduction.md
